message.content:
The page displays two distinct design mockups against a solid light blue background.  

### Left Mockup (Light Blue Rectangle):  
- **Background**: A light blue rectangle with a subtle white speckled texture.  
- **Top-Right Corner**: The "Wesal" logo, consisting of Arabic text "وسال" (stylized in a light blue/teal color), the word "wesal" in smaller, lighter gray text beneath it, and a heart-shaped icon with an interlocking design (matching the Arabic text’s color).  
- **Bottom-Left Corner**: The URL "www.wesal.com" in a light gray color.  


### Right Mockup (White Rectangle):  
- **Top Section**:  
  - A horizontal teal stripe (two thin parallel lines) with a dark navy blue vertical bar overlapping the left end of the stripe.  
  - To the right of the stripe: The "Wesal" logo (identical to the left mockup: Arabic text "وسال", "wesal" text, and heart icon).  
- **Middle Section**: A large, faint (low-opacity) heart shape (matching the logo’s color) centered on the white background.  
- **Bottom Section**:  
  - A dark teal horizontal bar with a dark navy blue vertical bar overlapping the right end of the bar.  
  - Within the teal bar:  
    - Left side: A yellow location pin icon followed by the text "123 Anywhere St., Any City, ST 12345" and a yellow globe icon followed by "www.wesal.com".  
    - Right side: A yellow envelope icon followed by "wesal@reallygreatsite.com" and a yellow phone icon followed by "+20 10 409 945 655".  
  - Above the teal bar (on the white background): A handwritten-style blue signature "mohaned", with the printed name "mohaned" and title "General Manager" in black text below it.  


All elements are arranged in a clean, modern layout with consistent color usage (light blue, teal, dark navy, yellow, and white) and repeated branding elements (logo, color palette, and design motifs like the heart and striped bars).
